content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the rb-lite Bash CLI end-to-end (bin/rb-lite, tests/smoke.sh, Makefile, README.md, .gitignore, AGENTS.md) against the project prompt and acceptance criteria. The implementation is correct and matches the intentionally minimal scope: implementer loop with git-state fingerprint stability detection, concurrent reviewer panel, P0-P3 detection driving remediation, predictable run-dir artifacts, no destructive git operations. Tests cover every stated requirement plus extras (quoted untracked paths, custom run-dir, reviewer operational failure). Syntax checks (bash -n) and smoke tests pass. The fingerprint correctly excludes .rb-lite, .ralph-burning, and the active run dir, and the test test_rb_lite_artifacts_do_not_affect_stability verifies this. set -Eeuo pipefail is consistently applied; argument parsing validates positive integers and mutually exclusive --task/--task-file. No critical bugs, safety issues, correctness gaps, or significant maintainability risks identified.

## Amendments

None.
